headline: Cousins Properties (CUZ) Is Up 5.2% After New US$1.2 Billion Credit Facility And Oracle Lease
summary: Cousins Properties recently closed a new five-year, US$1.20 billion unsecured credit facility, increasing its borrowing capacity by US$200 million and amending existing term loans to extend potential maturities while lowering borrowing spreads over SOFR. A few days earlier, Cousins announced a long-term 116,000-square-foot lease with Oracle at its Neuhoff mixed-use project in Nashville, a deal that further anchors the development with a high-profile tenant across an already largely leased...
